race.comment: LOTS TO LOVE (6) has been thereabouts in his two runs back without causing any major threats. Strips fitter third-up in what looks a more suitable assignment. Nearing his peak now and gets a key switch in Nock. Bold showing anticipated. RING AHOY (2) caught the eye two back here against stronger opposition when rattling home into fourth. Then made light work of his rivals last start over this trip at Wyong. Has found form now and can keep the ball rolling. ROCKBARTON ICON (7) is knocking on the door, running into the minors in his last three. Draws sticky but reunites with Bullock, who has success aboard prior. One of the main hopes. BLAZING GURU (4) is ticking along nicely, arriving just in time last time at Mudgee to get the verdict. Is drawn kinder this time and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claimer engaged. Doesn't need to do much more to be right there again.
